latestRelease.title: Fellowship Security, Keys & Join Request Pipelines

items.description: Added high-visibility Guild Secret ID / Invite Key viewer inside Settings modal with copy utilities.
Engineered Join Policy rules selector (direct vs approval), allowing captains to dictate request verification protocols.
Created inline Applicant list views on active team dashboard for convenient leadership approval and denial responses.
Moved exit and disband control buttons safely inside Settings modal, with tailored contextual messages.
